title: INSURANCE ENROLLMENT AND PAYMENT SUPPORT PROGRAM - 211info
text: PROJECT ACCESS NOW INSURANCE ENROLLMENT AND PAYMENT SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-person and virtual assistance applying for Oregon Health Plan (OHP) and private insurance on the Federal Health Insurance Marketplace. 650 NE Holladay Street Suite 1700 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Clients below 400% of federal poverty level (FPL) may be eligible for assistance with cost of insurance premiums. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm by appointment Email (503) 345-7031 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 345-7031 Enrollment and Support Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Navigator Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROJECT ACCESS NOW
